abilities.name: Dimensional Tear
abilities.description: Hitting enemies with @node-pink #Etheric Slash# will open a rift. Increasing #Distortion# gain by #25%# and increasing your damage. Also increases @node-blue #Meteor Shower#'s count. @node-yellow #Mana Current# reduces the cost of spells by #25%# while inside the rift. You want to have #100%# uptime on this ability.

abilities.name: Rift-Bound
abilities.description: #[SHIFT] @node-mage Heal# casts this for #6s# with a #20s# cooldown. @node-red #Dimensional Rift# will follow you and @node-red #Distortion# stops decaying. You want to have as much uptime on this as possible.

abilities.name: Distortion
abilities.description: @node-pink #Etheric Slash#, @node-blue #Warp Blast#, @node-blue #Frozen Tornado# can generate @node-red #Distortion#, you want as much of this as possible for high damage.

abilities.name: Time Vortex
abilities.description: #[SHIFT] @node-mage Ice Snake# while in @node-red #Dimensional Tear# Makes your @node-blue #Frozen Tornadoes# purple. Having longer #+2s# duration and deals damage #25%# faster. You want to have #100%# uptime on this as well

abilities.name: Frozen Tornado
abilities.description: @node-mage #Ice Snake# turns into Tornadoes. @node-pink #Sentient Snake# makes the Tornadoes homing. @node-pink #Snake Nest# gives you 3 Tornadoes.

abilities.name: Gravitational Collapse
abilities.description: @node-red #Dimensional Tear# overloads for #10s# and deals #+400%# more damage, you can fly and your @icon-mana #Mana# go down. Your @node-pink #Etheric Slashes# turn into lasers the fire 5 times. Your #Dimensional Rift# collapses at the end of the ultimate.

aspects.name: Riftwalker's Embodiment of Reality Alteration
aspects.description: Your @node-red #Distortion# decays slower and @node-red #Riftbound# gains more duration.

aspects.name: Aspect of the Inescapable Void
aspects.description: @node-pink #Dimensional Tear# and @node-red #Rift Rupture# gain more area effect and gives you Resistance.
